factionAbilities.name: COALESCENCE
factionAbilities.effect: After you explore a planet that does not have a sleeper token, you may place 1 sleeper token on that planet.

factionAbilities.name: AWAKEN
factionAbilities.effect: After you activate a system, you may replace each of your sleeper tokens in that system with 1 infantry from your reinforcements.

factionAbilities.name: UL TERRAFORMING
factionAbilities.effect: When you would place a sleeper token, you may instead place a space dock or PDS from your reinforcements that is not on the game board.

versions.effect: Place this card face up in your play area. When you explore a planet, you may place 1 sleeper token on that planet. Then, return this card to the Titans of Ul player.

factionTechnologies.name: Ul Terraforming
factionTechnologies.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to choose 1 planet you control that has a sleeper token; replace that sleeper token with 1 space dock or PDS from your reinforcements.

factionTechnologies.name: Biomechanical Link
factionTechnologies.effect: Your infantry in systems that contain your structures roll +1 on combat rolls.

abilities.name: Awakened Might
abilities.effect: After you activate this system, you may replace each of your sleeper tokens in this system with 1 infantry from your reinforcements.

mech.name: Monolith
mech.deploy: After you explore a planet, you may place this unit on that planet.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías amarillas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa.

ability.name: Awakening Protocol
ability.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to replace 1 sleeper token you control with 1 infantry from your reinforcements.

agent.name: Ul Commander
agent.ability: When you explore a planet: You may exhaust this card to place 1 sleeper token on that planet.

commander.name: The Arbiter Prime
commander.unlock: Have 3 sleeper tokens on the game board.
commander.ability: During combat, apply +1 to the results of each of your infantry combat rolls in systems that contain your structures.

hero.name: The World‑Breaker
hero.ability: ACTION: Purge this card to replace each of your sleeper tokens with 1 space dock or PDS from your reinforcements.
